comments: Approved based on direct verification of commit d3c0f66. git show --stat --name-status confirms implementation changes are limited to documentation/EN/, documentation/ZH/, plus the allowed task artifacts tasks/v0.7-docs-enrichment-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.7-docs-enrichment-result-review-packet.json; no src/, MCP server logic, workflow/dispatch.json, iteration-state.json, or .agent-state/ migration files were modified. Content inspection confirms deep expansions to CORE_CONCEPTS and ARCHITECTURE with state-machine and dual-track gating detail, concrete CLI and JSON examples in USAGE and TEAM_COLLABORATION, creation of bilingual EXTENSION_GUIDE.md files, Mermaid diagrams, multi-level headers, and warning/note callouts in the reviewed documentation set.
